'''鈭歳-t-dh''' ('''karatadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbosom|imbosom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbosom|imbosom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| karatadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratadh|thiratadh]] || [[word:jiratadh|jiratadh]] || [[word:shiratadh|shiratadh]] || [[word:kiratadh|kiratadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratadh|thuthuratadh]] || [[word:jujuratadh|jujuratadh]] || [[word:shushuratadh|shushuratadh]] || [[word:kukuratadh|kukuratadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratadh|thuratadh]] || [[word:juratadh|juratadh]] || [[word:shuratadh|shuratadh]] || [[word:kuratadh|kuratadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuratadh|thuratadh]] || [[word:juratadh|juratadh]] || [[word:shuratadh|shuratadh]] || [[word:kuratadh|kuratadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theratadh|theratadh]] || [[word:jeratadh|jeratadh]] || [[word:sheratadh|sheratadh]] || [[word:keratadh|keratadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratadh|thothoratadh]] || [[word:jojoratadh|jojoratadh]] || [[word:shoshoratadh|shoshoratadh]] || [[word:kokoratadh|kokoratadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratadh|thoratadh]] || [[word:joratadh|joratadh]] || [[word:shoratadh|shoratadh]] || [[word:koratadh|koratadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratadh|thoratadh]] || [[word:joratadh|joratadh]] || [[word:shoratadh|shoratadh]] || [[word:koratadh|koratadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ratadh|th忙ratadh]] || [[word:j忙ratadh|j忙ratadh]] || [[word:sh忙ratadh|sh忙ratadh]] || [[word:k忙ratadh|k忙ratadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharatadh|thatharatadh]] || [[word:jajaratadh|jajaratadh]] || [[word:shasharatadh|shasharatadh]] || [[word:kakaratadh|kakaratadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharatadh|tharatadh]] || [[word:jaratadh|jaratadh]] || [[word:sharatadh|sharatadh]] || [[word:karatadh|karatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatadh|tharatadh]] || [[word:jaratadh|jaratadh]] || [[word:sharatadh|sharatadh]] || [[word:karatadh|karatadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharatadh|sharatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharatadh|gosharatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharatadh|gokisharatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharatadhn眉|sharatadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkn眉|gosharatadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatadhn眉|gokisharatadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharatadhsh毛|sharatadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharatadhnksh毛|gosharatadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharatadhsh毛|gokisharatadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatadhro|sharatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkro|gosharatadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatadhro|gokisharatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatadhmu|sharatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkmu|gosharatadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatadhmu|gokisharatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharatadhsher|sharatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharatadhnksher|gosharatadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharatadhsher|gokisharatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharatadhng|sharatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkng|gosharatadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharatadhng|gokisharatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharatadhya|sharatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkya|gosharatadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharatadhya|gokisharatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharatadhyam|sharatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkyam|gosharatadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharatadhyam|gokisharatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatadhn眉sh毛|sharatadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkn眉sh毛|gosharatadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatadhn眉sh毛|gokisharatadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatadhn眉ro|sharatadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkn眉ro|gosharatadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatadhn眉ro|gokisharatadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatadhn眉mu|sharatadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkn眉mu|gosharatadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatadhn眉mu|gokisharatadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatadhsh毛n眉|sharatadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatadhnksh毛n眉|gosharatadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatadhsh毛n眉|gokisharatadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatadhsh毛ro|sharatadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatadhnksh毛ro|gosharatadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatadhsh毛ro|gokisharatadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatadhsh毛mu|sharatadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatadhnksh毛mu|gosharatadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatadhsh毛mu|gokisharatadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatadhron眉|sharatadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkron眉|gosharatadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatadhron眉|gokisharatadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatadhrosh毛|sharatadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkrosh毛|gosharatadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatadhrosh毛|gokisharatadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatadhromu|sharatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkromu|gosharatadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatadhromu|gokisharatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatadhmun眉|sharatadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkmun眉|gosharatadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatadhmun眉|gokisharatadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatadhmush毛|sharatadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkmush毛|gosharatadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatadhmush毛|gokisharatadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatadhmuro|sharatadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatadhnkmuro|gosharatadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatadhmuro|gokisharatadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
